---
title: "Unit 1: Lecture 1–6"
author: ""
---

In this section of Unit 1, you will learn what communication and language are. 
You'll learn the theories of language evolution,
appreciate the differences between human and animal communication,
and the relationship between society and language. 

## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

<!-- Either click on the slide area below or click [here](slides.qmd) to view it in fullscreen. -->
<!-- Use your keypad to navigate the slides. -->
**01**

<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;min-height:600px;">
<iframe src="lecture1.pdf" style="position=absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;min-height:600px;"></iframe>
</div>

***
**02**

<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;min-height:600px;">
<iframe src="lecture2.pdf" style="position=absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;min-height:600px;"></iframe>
</div>

***
**03**

<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;min-height:600px;">
<iframe src="lecture3.pdf" style="position=absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;min-height:600px;"></iframe>
</div>

***
**04**

<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;min-height:600px;">
<iframe src="lecture4.pdf" style="position=absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;min-height:600px;"></iframe>
</div>

***
**05**

<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;min-height:600px;">
<iframe src="lecture5.pdf" style="position=absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;min-height:600px;"></iframe>
</div>

***
**06**

<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;min-height:600px;">
<iframe src="lecture6.pdf" style="position=absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;min-height:600px;"></iframe>
</div>

Next you will learn what linguistics and its branches are.

<!-- ## ✍️ Coursework

🚧 Come back after the lecture to read the coursework instructions for the week 🚧-->


## 📚 Recommended Reading

- Check the end of slides for the list of references cited in the lecture.

## 📟 Communication

- You have my email and phone number already. Feel free to mail or text at any time.
